TextView.android:text: Dark background, light text throughout the app
Automatically detects your region for better distance estimates
Fallback if GPS is off (e.g. Newark, New Jersey, USA)
IRS standard is $0.90/mile. Adjust for your vehicle.
What your time is worth per hour. Used to calculate time cost per offer.
Profit % at or above this threshold shows a GREEN verdict. Default: 75%.
Profit % at or above this threshold shows a YELLOW verdict. Below is RED. Default: 50%.
Offers below this pay-per-mile rate are always RED regardless of profit %. Default: $1.50/mi.
Offers below this dollar amount are always RED regardless of profit %. Default: $6.00.
Fuel economy of your vehicle. Used to calculate real gas cost per offer.

com.google.android.material.button.Mater.android:text: Look up my MPG at fueleconomy.gov →

TextView.android:text: Current gas price in your area. Update weekly for accurate cost estimates.
Help other drivers by contributing anonymized offer data to community benchmarks.
How GigLens detects and analyzes offer screens.
Display offer results as a floating pill
Permission required: Draw over other apps
Seconds to show the result pill before it reverts to idle. Default 60.
Delay before screenshot fires after offer detected — allows map to finish rendering. Default: 1500. Increase if pins are missing from screenshots.
Use pin positions on map to estimate delivery town (recommended)
